title: Magical Jamaican Yeast Noodles
description: A unique fusion of magical flavors and traditional Jamaican spices with a hint of yeasty goodness. Serve as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Combine yeasty, magical, and Jamaican in a bowl.
Add beaten egg and mix until smooth.
Gradually add water and stir until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a noodle shape.
Boil the noodles in water for 3 minutes or until slightly firm.
Drain the noodles and serve immediately.
